subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-'Askar! All praise be unto God that thou hast, at the dawn of the Day of Manifestation, been favored with the radiant beams of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل عسکر الحمد لله در صبح یوم ظهور بانوار شمس حقیقت فائز شدی این نعمت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
